key_finding: BOTH strategies are currently ACTIVE production strategies with PENDING prediction_items in DB. P1.1 NOD classification was correct to flag these, but the risk was understated: these are not retired/dead strategies but live unregistered production strategies — a critical governance gap.

decisions.evidence_summary: fourier_rhythm_3bet is a LIVE POWER_LOTTO production strategy. Evidence: (1) Registered in get_power_lotto_strategies() in the production RSM engine (rolling_strategy_monitor.py line 749) as a named, stable strategy with fourier_3bet predict_func. (2) Has prediction_run id=168 (POWER_LOTTO, target_draw=115000034, 2026-04-27, snapshot_source=VALID) currently in the DB. (3) Has 3 PENDING prediction_items (IDs 1072-1074) representing computed predictions not yet resolved. (4) In p2 dry run, appeared in promotable_candidates (PROMOTABLE, runtime_write_allowed=false) — meaning the p2 backfill process identified it as eligible for replay row promotion. (5) memory/lessons.md references it as the PRODUCTION benchmark strategy: 'McNemar vs fourier_rhythm_3bet: net=+16, p=0.458', 'L76 principle reconfirmed: do not replace fourier_rhythm_3bet', 'L94: 30p overheat warning — maintain ONLINE, recheck in 30 draws'. (6) NOT a duplicate/alias of any canonical strategy (distinct from power_precision_3bet, power_orthogonal_5bet, power_shlc_midfreq, h6_gate_mk20_ew85). CRITICAL: This strategy is running live in production WITHOUT a canonical registry entry. Immediate registry addition required.
decisions.p11_nod_root_cause: P1.1 DB scan searched for strategy_id column in all tables. prediction_items and prediction_runs use strategy_name column — not strategy_id. The P1.1 conclusion of '0 rows in ALL tables' was based on column-name mismatch, not absence of data. The strategy has active rows via the strategy_name column.
decisions.operator_action_detail: Add fourier_rhythm_3bet to replay_strategy_registry.py as a POWER_LOTTO ONLINE strategy. Then run P2 replay backfill to promote its PENDING prediction_items to strategy_prediction_replays. strategy_name='fourier_rhythm_3bet', lottery_type='POWER_LOTTO', lifecycle_status='ONLINE', supported_prediction_run_id=168.

decisions.evidence_summary: ts3_regime_3bet is a LIVE BIG_LOTTO production strategy. Evidence: (1) Has 3 prediction_runs in DB: run_id=167 (BIG_LOTTO, draw=115000048, 2026-04-28, VALID), run_id=174 (BIG_LOTTO, draw=115000050, 2026-05-05, VALID), run_id=175 (BIG_LOTTO, draw=115000049, 2026-05-01, RECONSTRUCTED). (2) Has 9 PENDING prediction_items (IDs 1069-1071 for run 167, IDs 1090-1092 for run 174, IDs 1093-1095 for run 175). (3) In p2 dry run, appeared in promotable_candidates (PROMOTABLE, runtime_write_allowed=false) — eligible for replay backfill. (4) strategy_catalog_inventory_20260512.md section 6.2 explicitly lists it as a BIG_LOTTO production monitoring strategy: 'ts3_regime_3bet: wiki/games/big_lotto.md, UNKNOWN lifecycle, 監控參考策略'. (5) memory/lessons.md explicitly states: '繼續使用 regime_2bet/ts3_regime_3bet/p1_dev_sum5bet 生產策略' — this is an explicit operator decision to continue using it as a production strategy. (6) Another strategy was evaluated with 'McNemar vs ts3_regime_3bet: net=-6, p=0.606 — 新策略未改善生產' — ts3_regime_3bet is the production baseline. (7) NOT a duplicate of biglotto_ts3_acb_4bet or biglotto_ts3_markov_freq_5bet — those are different ts3 family variants (ACB and MarkovFreq respectively; this is the regime-switching ts3 variant). CRITICAL: This strategy is running live in production across multiple draws WITHOUT a canonical registry entry.
decisions.p11_nod_root_cause: Same as fourier_rhythm_3bet: P1.1 DB scan column-name mismatch (strategy_id vs strategy_name). Additionally, strategy_catalog_inventory_20260512.md was not in scope for P1.1 evidence scan.
decisions.operator_action_detail: Add ts3_regime_3bet to replay_strategy_registry.py as a BIG_LOTTO ONLINE strategy. Then run P2 replay backfill to promote its PENDING prediction_items across runs 167, 174, 175 to strategy_prediction_replays. strategy_name='ts3_regime_3bet', lottery_type='BIG_LOTTO', lifecycle_status='ONLINE', supported_prediction_run_ids=[167,174,175].

clean_denominator.coverage_rate_note: NOD 2 strategies have 0 strategy_prediction_replays rows. Once added to registry + P2 backfill run, they may qualify as COVERED or PARTIAL.
clean_denominator.expected_post_backfill_coverage_rate: 8/71 = 11.3% (if both get replay rows via P2 backfill)

p11_nod_root_cause_analysis.finding: P1.1 DB scan searched only for strategy_id column across all tables. The prediction_items and prediction_runs tables use strategy_name column (not strategy_id). Both strategies had active rows in prediction_runs.strategy_name and appeared in promotable_candidates of p2 dry run. The risk flag 'was_live_no_tombstone' was correct but the conclusion '0 rows in all tables' was a column-name miss, not actual data absence.
p11_nod_root_cause_analysis.impact_on_p11: P1.1 classification of NEEDS_OPERATOR_DECISION was CORRECT. The classification framework correctly flagged governance risk. However, P1.2 evidence reveals the situation is more serious: these are not retired strategies awaiting tombstone, but ACTIVE production strategies requiring immediate registry addition.

next_step_detail: Create registry entries for both strategies as ONLINE in replay_strategy_registry.py, then run P2 replay page operator acceptance with clean denominator = 71. The P2 backfill may then promote PENDING prediction_items to strategy_prediction_replays for these 2 strategies, increasing COVERED count from 6 to up to 8.
